underlying_goal: Verify the integrity of their memory/summary system, diagnose why an empty session record appeared in /resume, and fix any identified issues
friction_detail: Claude initially misunderstood 'empty conversation 4 minutes ago' as a SQLite record issue rather than a /resume list entry, requiring the user to clarify.
brief_summary: User wanted to check their memory/summary system status, diagnose a mysterious empty session in /resume, and fix issues — diagnosis was completed but the final fix was interrupted before execution.
